mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_workflow_template ORDER BY code ASC
SELECT * FROM agent_workflow_stage WHERE workflow_code = #{workflowCode} ORDER BY stage_order ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_workflow_template (code, name, description, category_scope, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{categoryScope, typeHandler=com.icss.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), description = VALUES(description), category_scope = VALUES(category_scope), enabled = VALUES(enabled), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO agent_workflow_stage (workflow_code, code, name, stage_order, role_label, description, allowed_actions, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{workflowCode}, #{code}, #{name}, #{stageOrder}, #{roleLabel}, #{description}, #{allowedActions, typeHandler=com.icss.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_workflow_route_rule ORDER BY intent_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_workflow_route_rule (intent_code, intent_name, target_workflow_code, entry_stage_code, priority_strategy, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{intentCode}, #{intentName}, #{targetWorkflowCode}, #{entryStageCode}, #{priorityStrategy}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE intent_name = VALUES(intent_name), target_workflow_code = VALUES(target_workflow_code), entry_stage_code = VALUES(entry_stage_code), priority_strategy = VALUES(priority_strategy), enabled = VALUES(enabled), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM workbench_layout_config ORDER BY workflow_code ASC, stage_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workbench_layout_config (code, name, workflow_code, stage_code, regions, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{workflowCode}, #{stageCode}, #{regions, typeHandler=com.icss.handler.JsonObjectTypeHandler}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), workflow_code = VALUES(workflow_code), stage_code = VALUES(stage_code), regions = VALUES(regions), enabled = VALUES(enabled), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
